title: phyllanthus wrightii
intro: Phyllanthus wrightii is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as Wright's phyllanthus or Wright's green-flowered phyllanthus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney diseases due to its hepatoprotective and nephroprotective properties. Phyllanthus wrightii is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
